subcodes.title: Closing prayer of public address, spoken on 1913-04-23
subcodes.first_line: O Thou King of existence! O Thou king beloved! The members of this meeting are the lovers of Thy face. They seek after Thee and long to converse with Thee.
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @prayer for forgiveness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @prayer for spiritual recognition
